prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 线索评分工作流。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/87-ai-lead-scoring-workflow.html

[环境] NocoBase env `maxbench02`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e maxbench02 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai87_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `maxbench02` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。
prompt.launchInstruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read ~/prj/vscodes/app-library-bench/tooling/bench/prompts/round-61-90/p87.prompt.txt as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env 'maxbench02' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e maxbench02): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

[relation-titleField-unreadable] flowSurfaces authoring validation failed with 1 error(s); fix all errors before retrying the same write

outcome.finalText:
The reproduction is complete and verified end-to-end. Final report below.

---

# FINAL REPORT — AI Lead Scoring Workflow (p87 "LeadSense") on `maxbench02`

The OSS template URL 404s; I sourced the authoritative prototype locally (`web/87-ai-lead-scoring-workflow.html`) and derived the model from its `LEADS` / `FEED` / `TIER_META` JS arrays (no embedded nb-spec). Prefix `ai87_`, isolated from the other prototypes on this instance.

## ① Collections (4, prefix `ai87_`)
| Collection | Rows | Role | Key fields |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai87_leads` | 24 | main (titleField `name`) | 20 business fields: name, role, company, score, **tier**(hot/warm/cool=Qualified/cold=Nurture), delta, **src**(7 channels), size, **region**(7), route, last_activity, email, annual_revenue, tech_stack, budget, **pipeline_stage**(8), **lead_source**(6), owner, reason, created_label |
| `ai87_signals` | 120 | o2m child → leads | signal_name, points, weight, color, description (the AI signal breakdown, 5/lead) |
| `ai87_extractions` | 120 | o2m child → leads | field_key, field_value, **confidence**(high/med/low) (AI-extracted fields, 5/lead) |
| `ai87_activities` | 7 | standalone feed | message(HTML), **kind**(7 enums), ts_label, occurred_at |

All-English seed; every enum branch covered (tiers 7/9/5/3, all 7 source channels, all 7 regions, all pipeline stages/sources, all 7 activity kinds). Relations: signals/extractions m2o→leads (FK `leadId`) with reverse o2m.

## ② Signature page
**Scoring Queue** — `pageSchemaUid = hft86tc7tia` (pageUid `3glz7bercnl`), under menu group **"AI Lead Scoring"**.
Region→block map: KPI strip = JSBlock; tier-pills + search = JSBlock (cross-filters the list via `ctx.engine`); ranked leads = **List + JSField** score-ring card → click opens native drawer; right rail = distribution-bars JSBlock + composer JSBlock + **activity-feed List + JSField**. Drawer = native Details (fieldGroups) + signals + extractions sub-tables.
CRUD list pages (all with Filter+Add+Table+View/Ed

Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

transcript.cmd: {"skill": "nocobase-prototype-repro"}

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

transcript.text:
The reproduction is complete and verified end-to-end. Final report below.

---

# FINAL REPORT — AI Lead Scoring Workflow (p87 "LeadSense") on `maxbench02`

The OSS template URL 404s; I sourced the authoritative prototype locally (`web/87-ai-lead-scoring-workflow.html`) and derived the model from its `LEADS` / `FEED` / `TIER_META` JS arrays (no embedded nb-spec). Prefix `ai87_`, isolated from the other prototypes on this instance.

## ① Collections (4, prefix `ai87_`)
| Collection | Rows | Role | Key fields |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ai87_leads` | 24 | main (titleField `name`) | 20 business fields: name, role, company, score, **tier**(hot/warm/cool=Qualified/cold=Nurture), delta, **src**(7 channels), size, **region**(7), route, last_activity, email, annual_revenue, tech_stack, budget, **pipeline_stage**(8), **lead_source**(6), owner, reason, created_label |
| `ai87_signals` | 120 | o2m child → leads | signal_name, points, weight, color, description (the AI signal breakdown, 5/lead) |
| `ai87_extractions` | 120 | o2m child → leads | field_key, field_value, **confidence**(high/med/low) (AI-extracted fields, 5/lead) |
| `ai87_activities` | 7 | standalone feed | message(HTML), **kind**(7 enums), ts_label, occurred_at |

All-English seed; every enum branch covered (tiers 7/9/5/3, all 7 source channels, all 7 regions, all pipeline stages/sources, all 7 activity kinds). Relations: signals/extractions m2o→leads (FK `leadId`) with reverse o2m.

## ② Signature page
**Scoring Queue** — `pageSchemaUid = hft86tc7tia` (pageUid `3glz7bercnl`), under menu group **"AI Lead Scoring"**.
Region→block map: KPI strip = JSBlock; tier-pills + search = JSBlock (cross-filters the list via `ctx.engine`); ranked leads = **List + JSField** score-ring card → click opens native drawer; right rail = distribution-bars JSBlock + composer JSBlock + **activity-feed List + JSField**. Drawer = native Details (fieldGroups) + signals + extractions sub-tables.
CRUD list pages (all with Filter+Add+Table+View/Edit/Delete drawer): Leads `8107vlw67y0` (View drawer has both sub-tables), Signals `pwtjwbw9pd7`, Extracted Fields `7wukcc57wgj`, AI Activity `7yz8datfnmn`.

## ③ Self-Score: **9/10**

## ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Matches:** 2-column layout (KPI top, left ranked-list, right stacked rail), the 4 KPI cards with icon/big-number/trend/sparkline, lead cards with colored score-ring + tier tag + source icon + size + delta arrow + route chip + time, tier segmented pills **with live counts**, search, score-distribution 6-bucket colored bars, the "Score a new lead" composer, the AI activity icon-dot feed, and the click→detail drawer.
- **Verified interactions:** clicking "Hot" pill filters the list **24 → 7**; clicking a card opens the native drawer showing the lead's Details + 5 signals + extracted fields; sorted by score desc; zero page errors.
- Numbers are computed live so they differ from the prototype's hardcoded mocks (Avg score 60.9 vs 61.4; Auto-routed 16 vs 18) — correct behavior.

## ⑤ Gaps / tradeoffs
- **Drawer styling:** native Details + sub-tables instead of the prototype's semicircle gauge + custom signal-bars + confidence-badge layout. All content is present and faithful; the visual styling is less bespoke.
- **KPI 4th card:** "Qualified+" (count) replaces the prototype's "Avg. response 8m" — there is no response-time field in the data.
- **Composer** is visual-only (the prototype's "Analyze & score" is itself a 2-second mock).
- Left sidebar chrome (the "Model accuracy" card, custom nav sections) is not reproduced — NocoBase supplies its own navigation.

## Pitfalls hit (recorded to memory)
- m2o `reverseField` 500s unless it carries its **own** `target`+foreignKey+sourceKey; `titleField` only settable via body JSON, and re-applying a full body with an existing relation 500s → set it with a minimal `{name,titleField}` body.
- apply-blueprint rejects string `actions:["filter","create"]` ("addAction only supports registered action types") — omit them and th
